nodes.label: AI as collaborative conversational partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as direct solution provider or replacement for own creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I find the conversations themselves to inspire me to come up with my own ideas

nodes.label: AI as compromise to creative integrity
nodes.label_negative: AI use that replaces personal creative effort
nodes.grounding_span: I've never used AI in a way that I thought was going against my personal integrity

nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for reasoning
nodes.label_negative: AI as shortcut for quick task completion without depth
nodes.grounding_span: I want something that's going to have more of an impact

nodes.label: AI as acceptable conversation partner vs. unacceptable ghostwriter
nodes.label_negative: AI as complete replacement for human authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see conversations to inspire creativity as a bad thing - it's no different than talking with a fellow writer friend

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I love thinking of creative solutions

nodes.label: Meaningful impact through engaging learning materials
nodes.grounding_span: I want something that's going to have more of an impact

nodes.label: Societal benefit and prevention of cognitive laziness
nodes.grounding_span: I want it to make society better, but not turn it into a technology that's going to make people lazy and dumb

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: it inspired me to create an interactive game that incorporated real-world scenarios and it was a huge hit

nodes.label: Concern about AI-induced laziness
nodes.grounding_span: I'm concerned that people will use it as an excuse to become cognitively and creatively lazy

nodes.label: Commitment to keep using AI to stay relevant
nodes.grounding_span: I want to keep the conversation going. If it's not broke, why fix it?

nodes.label: Conversational exploratory ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I'll usually start off a conversation like... I'll usually do a follow-up question

nodes.label: Solo creative work with preference for independent ideation
